status: internal claim-boundary review, not buyer-ready final copy
overall_verdict: The Strategic Evaluation Package is commercially strong and appropriately premium, but it must keep visible boundaries around diagnostic use, synthetic stress review, non-certification, and non-runtime status before any outreach or executive PDF is created.
allowed_claims: SpecShift provides a pre-deployment diagnostic review for high-consequence AI-agent workflows.
SpecShift uses synthetic stress scenarios to identify candidate failure modes in evidence handling, scope boundaries, handoffs, escalation logic, and recovery paths.
SpecShift outputs structured internal maps and review materials that can support architecture-stage decision-making.
SpecShift can help teams identify where a workflow may need additional design guardrails before scaling.
claims_to_avoid: Do not claim certification, compliance approval, safety guarantee, deployment readiness, or benchmark status.
Do not imply runtime monitoring, runtime protection, access-control enforcement, HR decision tooling, legal advice, or cybersecurity scanning.
Do not claim validated performance, incident reduction, or production reliability without evidence.
Do not imply that synthetic stress review proves real-world behavior.

phrases_to_restrict.rule: Allowed when tied to workflow importance, not when implying safety certification.
Allowed when described as synthetic/internal, not as validated benchmark testing.
Allowed only as pricing posture or internal commercial structure, not as a promise of broad transfer.
Allowed as buyer value framing, but not as proven production reduction unless evidence exists.

buyer_ready_before_external_use: Add a short standing boundary line to every outward-facing version.
Remove internal-only pricing posture if sending cold outreach; reserve detailed pricing for qualified conversations.
Keep the first external version focused on one paid diagnostic pilot, not all tiers at once.
Avoid attaching the guardrail checklist until after buyer interest is established.
Avoid sending the full strategic package cold; use a shorter outreach note first.
safe_standing_boundary_line: SpecShift Architectural Logic Diagnostics is a pre-deployment diagnostic and architecture-stage review process. It is not a benchmark, certification, compliance audit, runtime monitor, security tool, deployment approval, or guarantee of AI safety.

recommended_next_external_artifact.artifact_name: Bounded Paid Pilot Outreach Email v0.1
recommended_next_external_artifact.purpose: Create a short email that introduces the diagnostic pilot without attaching the full package or overclaiming.
must_include: Specific ask for a short scoping call

failure_column: This claim-boundary review fails if the Strategic Evaluation Package is sent externally in full before a shorter outreach artifact is created, or if any outward-facing language implies certification, benchmark status, compliance sign-off, runtime protection, deployment readiness, validated performance, or guaranteed safety.
final_recommendation: Proceed to a short bounded paid-pilot outreach email. Do not create an executive PDF yet. The PDF should come after one more pass that removes internal pricing tiers or converts them into qualified-discussion language.
